completed_slice: Converted the immutable claim-transition contract into an executable fail-closed graph validator with deterministic adversarial tests.

claim_states.observed: CM-1024's executable-reconciler gap is partially closed for graph semantics.

claim_states.proposed: Integrate the validator before continuity effective-state computation.

privacy_boundary: No private chat, health, credential, identifying, or unreviewed upload content was inspected or committed.
next_action: Add immutable source digest and locator verification, then migrate one pre-CM-1024 record into stable claim nodes and transitions without rewriting the original record.
